name: unisharp
summary: Generate a 3D Gaussian splat from one perspective, panorama, or fisheye image using Insta360 UniSHARP.
description: Runs the UniSHARP single-image inference path inside LichtFeld Studio for perspective, panorama, and fisheye inputs, with optional camera calibration, plugin-local checkpoint/source downloads, and direct scene insertion through LFS scene.add_splat when available. Local CUDA inference; the UniSHARP checkpoint, UniK3D, and 3DGEER source dependencies are prepared on first use. Fisheye mode requires building the 3DGEER CUDA rasterizer with a CUDA-compatible compiler toolchain.
author: Yehe Liu
